description: A transformer fails, causing a power outage in a residential neighborhood. An operator must use FLISR to restore power.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert from a smart meter indicating a power outage at a specific address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the initial outage report.

nodes.task_description: The FLISR (Fault Location, Isolation, and Service Restoration) system automatically identifies the faulted grid section.

expected_outcome.value: The system pinpoints the outage to a specific transformer and the homes it serves.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the FLISR system to remotely reroute power from an adjacent circuit, restoring power to most affected homes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the automated action, and power is restored to 90% of customers.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a repair crew to replace the failed transformer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a work order for the physical repair.
